title: GWI POS Baseline Applied
description: Records which baseline version and roles have been successfully applied to this node. Written by Ansible post_tasks after a successful run. Lives at /opt/gwi-pos/state/baseline-applied.json. Used by MC to determine whether a node is up-to-date. Example: {"schema_version":"1.0","producer":"ansible-post-tasks","generated_at":"2026-03-20T14:35:00Z","node_id":"nuc-venue-001","baseline_version":"baseline-2026.03.20.1","roles_applied":["os_hardening","firewall","display_manager","sshd_hardening"],"last_known_good_at":"2026-03-20T14:40:00Z","policy_version":"policy-2026.03.20.1"}

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this file was written.

node_id.description: Unique node identifier from SERVER_NODE_ID in .env.

baseline_version.description: Baseline version that was applied, from installer/VERSION.

roles_applied.description: List of Ansible role names that were successfully applied in this baseline run.

last_known_good_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last successful post_reboot_verify. Updated by the verify process after reboot confirms health. Null if verify has never completed.

policy_version.description: Policy version that was in effect when this baseline was applied. Null if no policy was set.
